returns.summary: Summit Outfitters accepts returns within 30 days of delivery for items in original, unused condition with tags attached.
conditions: Item must be unused and in original packaging
Must be within 30 days of delivery date
Final sale items are not eligible for return
Worn or washed apparel cannot be returned unless defective
returns.process: Initiate a return through your account portal or contact support. A prepaid return label will be emailed within 1 business day. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the item.

shipping.notes: Orders placed Monday-Friday before 2pm MST typically ship same day. Weekend orders ship Monday.

warranty.summary: All Summit Outfitters branded products carry a lifetime warranty against manufacturing defects.
does_not_cover: Third-party brand products (subject to manufacturer warranty)
warranty.process: Contact support with your order number and photos of the defect. We'll review within 2 business days and arrange a repair, replacement, or store credit.

price_match.summary: We'll match any competitor's current advertised price on identical in-stock items.
price_match.process: Contact support with a link to the competitor's listing. Price match is applied as a refund if already purchased within 7 days.
